what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-source channel, linking attachment id att-ff6eebcf to the image target image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-12 and noting when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target uses a custom image:// URI scheme pointing to design-source/pitch-deck/p-12.
The added timestamp is an ISO 8601 value with timezone offset.
The id in the frontmatter matches the filename stem att-ff6eebcf.
standouts: It maps an attachment id to a specific pitch-deck image asset (p-12).
It is a minimal, timestamped ledger entry with no additional asset details.
It uses a channel-memory attachment directory convention.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
URI-style target pointer for the referenced asset.
concerns: No actual image data, alt text, or content description is present.
No uploader, author, or provenance metadata is recorded.
The image:// target cannot be resolved from this file alone.
No file size, format, or version information is included.
notes: A minimal attachment ledger stub that records which pitch-deck image asset belongs to the design-source channel and when the record was created.
questions: What visual content does image p-12 contain?
Where is the actual image file stored and how is the image:// scheme resolved?
Who added this attachment and why?
What does p-12 represent within the pitch-deck?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose of an attachment record matches the content: it stores an id, type, target, channel, and timestamp for an image attachment.
intention_signals: To create a stable, discoverable record that associates a design-source channel attachment with a specific pitch-deck image asset for later retrieval or audit.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier and target pointer for an image attachment, allowing downstream queries to locate which channel asset corresponds to pitch-deck image p-12 and when the association was recorded.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment ledger entry mapping attachment id att-ff6eebcf to image target design-source/pitch-deck/p-12 in the design-source channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record and reference an image attachment for a pitch-deck asset within the design-source channel.
